moving-around.label: Ap deplase ak cd
moving-around.summary: Sèvi ak cd, .., ., ak ~ pou deplase ant dosye yo an sekirite.

sketch2.title: Li chemen yo an sekirite anvan ou deplase

project.title: Bati yon kat navigasyon senp pou espas travay yon kliyan

moving-around-try-it-1.title: Travay final: antre nan yon dosye
moving-around-try-it-1.prompt: Ou bezwen antre nan dosye `navigation-practice`. Kouri `ls`, apre sa `cd navigation-practice`, epi `pwd` pou konfime ou deplase.
moving-around-try-it-1.hint: Fè lis an premye, deplase dezyèm, epi konfime nouvo adrès ou a ak `pwd`.

help.concept: Yon tach "Try It" pèmèt ou pratike kòmand ki nan leson an nan yon espas travay reyèl.
help.hint_1: Kreye dosye paran anvan ou kreye oswa deplase fichye yo.
help.hint_2: Tcheke travay ou ak ls, cat, oswa find anvan ou klike sou Tcheke.

moving-around-try-it-1.starterCode: # Use the terminal for this Linux task.

2.message: Kouri `pwd` apre ou fin chanje dosye yo.

0.message: Pa itilize sudo pou travay espas travay pou debutan.

moving-around-try-it-2.title: Travay terminal: monte ak cd ..
moving-around-try-it-2.prompt: Kòmanse andedan `navigation-practice/start`, epi monte yon nivo. Kouri `cd navigation-practice/start`, `pwd`, `cd ..`, ak `pwd` ankò.
moving-around-try-it-2.hint: Apre `cd ..`, dezyèm `pwd` la ta dwe montre dosye paran an.

help.concept: Yon tach "Try It" pèmèt ou pratike kòmand ki nan leson an nan yon espas travay reyèl.

moving-around-try-it-3.title: Travay final: retounen lakay ak cd ~
moving-around-try-it-3.prompt: Sote soti nan yon dosye anndan yon lòt pou retounen nan dosye lakay ou. Kouri `cd navigation-practice/reports`, `pwd`, `cd ~`, ak `pwd` ankò.
moving-around-try-it-3.hint: Sèvi ak `~` kòm chemen kout pou retounen nan dosye lakay ou, epi konfime ak `pwd`.

try_moving_around_sketch0.title: Eseye li poukont ou: antre nan yon dosye
try_moving_around_sketch0.prompt: Kouri `ls`, apre sa `cd navigation-practice`, epi `pwd` pou konfime chanjman dosye a.

try_moving_around_sketch1.title: Eseye li poukont ou: monte nan repètwa anlè a ak cd ..
try_moving_around_sketch1.prompt: Kouri `cd navigation-practice/start`, `pwd`, `cd ..`, ak `pwd` ankò pou pratike deplase nan dosye paran an.

try_moving_around_sketch2.title: Eseye l poukont ou: retounen lakay ou ak CD ~
try_moving_around_sketch2.prompt: Kouri `cd navigation-practice/reports`, `pwd`, `cd ~`, ak `pwd` ankò pou pratike chemen kout dosye lakay ou.

q1.title: Sa`cd` fè
q1.prompt: Ki kòmand ki chanje dosye kouran ou nan Tèminal Linux la?
q1.hint: Sèvi ak eksplikasyon leson an ak fason kesyon sa a ekri pou limite repons lan.

help.concept: Tèks sipò sa a te repare paske fòmil orijinal la te revele repons lan twò dirèkteman.
help.hint_1: Konpare kesyon an ak egzanp leson an epi retire detay ki pa matche ak konsèp ki mande a.
help.hint_2: Sèvi ak wòl la oswa prèv ki nonmen nan kesyon an olye pou w konte sou fason ou ekri repons lan.

moving-around-single-choice-2.title: Chwazi pi bon deskripsyon an.
moving-around-single-choice-2.prompt: Ki fraz ki pi byen koresponn ak 'Moving Around with cd'?
moving-around-single-choice-2.hint: Chèche repons ki dekri konsèp prensipal leson an.

help.concept: Kesyon sa a tcheke lide prensipal la nan Moving Around with cd.
help.hint_1: Sèvi ak eksplikasyon leson an, epi elimine repons ki pa matche avè l.
help.hint_2: Chwazi repons ki koresponn ak konsèp kou a, pa yon detay o aza.

options.a: Li dekri konsèp prensipal la nan leson an.
options.b: Li pa gen rapò ak sijè kou a.
options.d: Li ranplase konsèp la ak yon chemen kout ki pa an sekirite.

moving-around-multi-choice-1.title: Chwazi abitid aprantisaj ki an sekirite
moving-around-multi-choice-1.prompt: Ki aksyon ki bon abitid pandan w ap aprann sijè sa a?
moving-around-multi-choice-1.hint: Bon abitid kenbe aprenan an konsantre sou objektif leson an ak rezilta vizib yo.

help.concept: Kesyon sa a tcheke lide prensipal la nan Moving Around with cd.
help.hint_1: Sèvi ak eksplikasyon leson an, epi elimine repons ki pa matche avè l.
help.hint_2: Chwazi repons ki koresponn ak konsèp kou a, pa yon detay o aza.

options.a: Li enstriksyon an byen anvan ou aji.
options.b: Tcheke rezilta w apre w fin fè yon chanjman.
options.c: Inegore non egzak yo nan travay la
options.d: Sèvi ak rakousi ki pa gen rapò san konprann yo

moving-around-drag-reorder-1.title: Kòmande yon kou sou pratik an sekirite
moving-around-drag-reorder-1.prompt: Mete etap aprantisaj sa yo nan yon lòd ki an sekirite.
moving-around-drag-reorder-1.hint: Li chak moso epi ranje yo nan lòd deklarasyon an dwe konprann.

help.concept: Moso yo ta dwe fòme yon deklarasyon valab nan yon lòd lojik.
help.hint_1: Kòmanse ak moso ki prezante lide a oswa aksyon an.
help.hint_2: Mete moso depandan yo apre pati yo dekri oswa konplete.

tokens.t4: Reflechi sou sa k te chanje

q2.title: Monte yon nivo
q2.prompt: Konplete kòmand ki deplase soti nan dosye aktyèl la pou ale nan dosye paran li.
q2.hint: Itilize chemen espesyal ki vle di 'dosye paran.'

help.concept: Nan chemen Linux, `..` refere a repètwa ki yon nivo pi wo pase kote ou ye kounye a.
help.hint_1: Sa a pa yon kòmand poukont li isit la; se sib la yo itilize apre `cd`.
help.hint_2: Ranje kout pou dosye paran an itilize de pwen.

q3.title: Ale nan yon dosye pwojè
q3.prompt: Yon script chanje dosye anvan li fè lòt travay. Kisa li ta dwe fè tou pou ou ka konfime li rive nan bon kote a?
q3.hint: Chèche opsyon ki fè chanjman dosye a vizib nan pwodiksyon an.

help.concept: Yon pwosesis navigasyon komen se kreye yon dosye ak `mkdir`, antre ladan l ak `cd`, epi verifye nouvo repètwa travay la ak `pwd`.
help.hint_1: Ou bezwen yon kòmand pou kreye dosye a epi yon lòt pou antre ladan l.
help.hint_2: Apre ou fin antre nan `client-site`, egzekite kòmand ki enprime repètwa travay aktyèl la pou sòti tèminal la montre nouvo kote a.

q3.template: Yon script ki chanje dosye yo ta dwe tou ____ pou rezilta a fasil pou verifye.

sketch-1.title: Sa chanjman `cd` yo
sketch-1.bodyMarkdown:
`cd` means **change directory**. A directory is just another word for a folder. When you run `cd`, you move your terminal's current location to a different folder.

A good habit is to check where you are before and after moving:

```bash
pwd
cd projects
pwd
```

Step by step:

- `pwd` prints your current folder.
- `cd projects` moves into the `projects` folder if it exists in your current location.
- The second `pwd` confirms the new location.

Example:

```bash
/home/learner
cd projects
/home/learner/projects
```

This matters because many terminal commands act on your **current folder**. If you are in the wrong place, `ls`, `touch`, `mkdir`, `cp`, or `mv` may affect the wrong files.

sketch-2.title: Sèvi ak `..`, `.`, ak `~`
sketch-2.bodyMarkdown:
Some `cd` targets are shortcuts:

- `..` means **the parent folder**
- `.` means **the current folder**
- `~` means **your home folder**

Worked example:

```bash
pwd
cd ..
pwd
cd ~
pwd
```

Line by line:

- The first `pwd` shows where you start.
- `cd ..` moves up one level.
- The next `pwd` shows the parent folder.
- `cd ~` jumps to your home folder from anywhere.
- The last `pwd` confirms that jump.

`cd .` usually keeps you in the same place. It can still be useful when you are practicing path ideas and want to show “stay here.”

sketch-3.title: Li chemen yo an sekirite anvan ou deplase
sketch-3.bodyMarkdown:
A path tells the terminal **which folder** you want. Before using `cd`, it helps to inspect the current folder with `ls`.

Example:

```bash
pwd
ls
cd reports
ls
```

What happens:

- `pwd` shows your starting location.
- `ls` lists folders and files there.
- `cd reports` moves into the `reports` folder.
- `ls` now shows what is inside `reports`.

If `reports` is not listed before you try `cd reports`, the command will fail because that folder is not in your current location. Checking with `ls` first helps you move confidently and avoid mistakes.
